overall.description: Nighttime driving through a rainy suburban hillside neighborhood in a video game (GTA V style). The vehicle navigates wet winding roads with rocky cliffs on the left and residential walls on the right, encountering and passing an oncoming car under streetlights.

segments.scene_description: Driving along a wet, winding suburban road at night during heavy rain. The vehicle navigates a curve with a rocky cliff face on the left and a residential concrete wall on the right. An oncoming car's headlights appear in the distance, approaching around the bend.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding road during vehicle passing maneuver

events.description: passing the oncoming vehicle on the left side as it drives in the opposite direction
oncoming vehicle passes by and recedes into the distance behind

agents.ego_description: passing the oncoming vehicle on the left and continuing down the wet winding road

notable_agents.action: passing by on the left side, moving in the opposite direction with headlights bright

entered.detail: yellow diamond-shaped warning sign mounted on a pole at the roadside

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes the oncoming car on the left side of the narrow wet road. A yellow road sign becomes visible on the left as the vehicle continues along the curve. The rocky cliff face and residential wall remain prominent on either side as the drive continues through the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a rain-slicked suburban road that transitions from a tense approach toward oncoming traffic to a solitary journey deeper into the hillside. It begins by navigating a winding curve under heavy rain, flanked by a towering rocky cliff on the left and a residential concrete wall on the right. As the vehicle rounds the bend, the distant glow of headlights emerges, intensifying as the camera closes the gap with an approaching car. The scene then shifts as the vehicle passes the oncoming car on the narrow wet road, momentarily illuminating a yellow road sign on the left. Finally, the camera continues forward through the downpour, leaving the other vehicle behind while the cliff face and residential walls persist along the dark, winding path.
